description_long: This lamp features a boxy, utilitarian design with a rectangular main body and a protruding square light housing on one end. The surface appears to be made of metal, with a matte, slightly weathered finish, and some visible discoloration or grime, suggesting outdoor use. The front face of the lamp has a translucent or frosted glass or plastic cover, likely protecting the internal light source. The rear and sides are mostly plain, with some minor surface irregularities and what appears to be a mounting bracket or fixture on the back. The lamp is designed to be mounted on a wall or flat vertical surface, with the light projecting outward. Its overall appearance is functional and industrial, suitable for urban or public environments such as building exteriors, garages, or alleyways.
description: A boxy, industrial wall-mounted lamp with a square light housing and a matte metal finish, designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square light housing with a translucent cover and the main rectangular body behind it.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated rectangular body and the protruding light housing on the left.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain back surface and possible mounting bracket, with the light housing barely visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the main body and the side of the light housing, with some surface discoloration.
